description:
GovClose Certification Overview: https://www.govclose.com/govclose-certification-program

In this video, I cover a topic that is essential whether you're selling to the government, running a consulting business, or working as an account executive. 

Email and email marketing is probably not something most people are thinking about with government contracts, but it is VERY important. 

This can make or break your business no matter what it is, and there are a lot of good takeaways whether you've been in the game for a while or just getting started. 

Specifically, you want to make sure that:
- Your email is getting delivered
- People, whether they're in the government or their other companies, are opening your email
- People are taking the action you want them to take once they do open your email
- You're following the appropriate rules

What to watch next:
1. For military veterans: https://youtu.be/cXGnPUaimAU
2. For federal workers: https://youtu.be/Wg1St7M3yB8
3. For government contract proposal writing: https://youtu.be/bcHPij1WnFs

Connect with Rick on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/govclose/
